company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing, captioning, and publishing workflows for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other content platforms.

policies.refund_policy: No refunds are provided after 7 days from the date of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours.
policies.trial: A 7-day free trial is available for both plans. No credit card required.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your account remains active until the end of the billing period.

faqs.a: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and Facebook.

faqs.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.a: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.
Yes! We offer a 7-day free trial for both Basic and Pro plans, no credit card required.
AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM for both input and output.
